expected_effect: Create a genuinely new frontier candidate if the additive latent-state surface is locally saturated.

novelty_coordinates.differs_from: simple asymmetric surface and threshold shock-spike pivots

rationale: Replace the single additive quote surface with a competitive mode and a protective mode, switched by a hysteretic router with minimum dwell time, so the fee map can separate calm competition from anti-arb defense without reverting to threshold shock spikes.
title: Two-mode switched quote controller
